reviews.comment:
Todas las estaciones de servicio del ACA tienen una atención mediocre, parece que te estuvieran haciendo un favor al despacharte y además son tortugas, se nota pocas ganas de trabajar

(Translated by Google)
All ACA service stations have mediocre service; it's like they're doing you a favor by serving you, and they're incredibly slow, showing little desire to work.

reviews.comment:
Había muchos vehículos y 1 playero para los 2 surtidores que son varios...se juntaron tantos autos que decidimos cargar en otro lado, siempre es buena la atención  pero el sábado había poco personal

(Translated by Google)
There were many vehicles and only one attendant for the two pumps, which are several... so many cars gathered that we decided to fill up somewhere else. The service is always good, but on Saturday there were very few staff.
